title: Chapter 18
content:
Chapter 18: The Black Hooded Girl And Burning Desire (Hina R18 I)

Inside Tokyo Plush City Hospital.

The three female awakeners from before lay on separate hospital beds. Their bodies were currently enveloped by a pale green light coming from the lady standing beside them.

It was obvious she was a healer.

Under the soothing green light, their wounds slowly began disappearing.

Suddenly, one of the female awakeners abruptly sat up from the bed.

"Haa...!" Her breathing was rough as she frantically looked around the room.

’Hospital...? Did that awakener manage to kill the Boss Monster...?’ she thought anxiously.

The last thing she remembered was the horrifying nest filled with spiders and she and the two girls beside her wrapped up like cocoons and hung upside down.

Then she noticed the woman beside her wearing a white coat with green patterns embroidered around the sleeves.

The doctor immediately spoke calmly. "Please calm down, you’re in the hospital."

The female awakener blinked several times.

"You were brought here for treatment after you and your teammates were rescued from the Gate." After a brief pause she continued. "Fortunately your injuries weren’t serious. They were mostly superficial wounds, so healing them wasn’t difficult."

The female awakener slowly relaxed after hearing those words.

Click!

The hospital room door suddenly opened and four women walked inside. Two of them were dressed completely in black suits.

Their sharp gazes and the terrifying pressure radiating from their bodies made it obvious they were at least D-Rank awakeners or possibly even higher.

Following behind them were Captain Morgan dressed in her military combat uniform and the female analyst from before. She held a thick file tightly in her arms, quietly adjusting her glasses while the doctor quietly left the room.

"Suvy... E-Rank Awakener 506... I need you to tell me what exactly happened in that gate and leave no details out."

***

’Screw this. If the system wants me to do it, then fine.’

"Do you want to feel it?"

Hina’s breath caught. She clearly didn’t expect Reiji to be that bold.

’I want to so bad, Rei-kun...’ Hina thought. God knows how long she had been holding herself back from pouncing on him.

Reiji gently wrapped his arms around her waist, his grip soft but firm.

Hina didn’t pull away. Instead, she slowly slipped her arms around his neck, leaning closer as she moved her hips back and forth against his lap in a slow, steady rhythm.

Reiji’s dick became hard as it rubbed against Hina’s pussy.

Hina’s face instantly flushed red.

’So big and hard.’

Reiji suddenly removed Hina’s arms from his neck and kissed her.

Their tongues clashed for what felt like forever, leaving both of them breathless.

"Ah..."

Their lips finally parted, a thin strand of saliva still connecting them.

They both stared at each other, the atmosphere becoming even more erotic.

"Rei... why are you suddenly so bold.." Hina asked while catching her breath from the kiss.

"Honestly, I don’t know...." Reiji replied, his face also flushed red.

Hina grabbed Reiji’s face with both hands, her eyes gleaming with possessive intensity.

"I love it." She said before kissing him on the lips once again.

It wasn’t aggressive or rushed but slow, soft and deep.

It made Reiji’s heart beat even faster.

Their lips parted again and Reiji started kissing Hina’s neck, slowly going down to her shoulder.

Hina’s back arched involuntarily from the odd pleasure. She could feel the heat rising up inside her, making her wet.

Reiji continued, but this time he bit even harder, not too hard, but just enough to make Hina let out a soft moan. He continued, not paying any mind to the system notification going off in his head.

He moved down towards Hina’s chest, leaving red marks on her exposed skin.

Reiji then began to remove her clothes.

"Rei-kun...." Hina whispered softly. Her voice a mix of desire and enticement. "You’ve never acted like this before..."

Reiji’s hands paused slightly. Even he realized it. Usually he would feel embarrassed and panic whenever things became intimate. He didn’t know whether it was because he was sexually frustrated, or the fact that a cute girl was with him and didn’t mind it, or whatever else.

All he wanted was to pound her all night without stopping.

After all, it was bound to happen sooner or later, so there was no point delaying the inevitable.

Before Reiji could respond, Hina kissed him briefly. "...I don’t want this side of Rei-kun belonging to anyone else."

It made Reiji’s heartbeat skip a beat. Because the way she said it sounded less affectionate and more like a warning.

Somehow it made Reiji feel even hornier. He quickly removed her clothes. ’She isn’t wearing a bra...’

Though he had already felt it through her thin clothes, seeing them up close made his mind go blank. Reiji swallowed, staring at them.

He had seen a lot on +18 websites, but seeing it this close was magical. Hina was gifted with big breasts. Reiji grabbed Hina’s breast; he felt his hand sinking into soft warmth. It made his nose bleed.

He quickly used his other hand to wipe his bloody nose and continued enjoying the soft feeling against his palm.

It made him even harder and Hina could feel it between her thighs. She started moving back and forth a little, letting out soft moans that made the rising heat in Reiji’s body intensify.

He planted a kiss on Hina’s ear and started moving downwards to her neck. He didn’t stop till he reached her nipple, making a soft moan escape Hina’s mouth.

"Rei... how long are you going to continue sucking my breast? I want you to stick it in."

***

"So a strange female awakener with a black oversized hoodie that has a lot of holes came to the Boss Room. Is that correct...?"

"Yes Captain."

’And from what the second team told us. It seems that the mysterious female awakener or adventurer killed the Boss Monster. But I don’t remember sending anyone in except for the first team and second...’

Morgan’s eyes suddenly narrowed.

"Yuri."

"Captain...?" The analysts quietly beside Morgan answered.

"Bring me the surveillance footage from the last Gate raid."

"Yes Captain."
